title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Roche India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Roche India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Roche India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Nagpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Roche India Advisory Limited:
Roche India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Roche India Advisory Limited!
